display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Saving Westbrook High
programme.desc: Students, their parents and faculty face an uphill battle as they try to prevent their beloved school from closing due to budget cuts.

programme.title: My Dad's a Soccer Mom
programme.desc: Cut from his NFL football team, a man starts bonding with his young daughter (Skai Jackson) and encourages her to play soccer.

programme.title: And Then There Was You
programme.desc: Natalie picks up the pieces of her life after her husband leaves and falls in love with a man with secrets.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show
programme.desc: When Jordan joins the wrestling team, he overeats and finds himself in a weight class in which he is outmatched.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show
programme.desc: When Bernie agrees to participate in a celebrity marathon, Vanessa declares that she will finish the race ahead of him.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show
programme.desc: When Bernie gives Vanessa money for school clothes, she decides to spend it all on an expensive pair of shoes.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show
programme.desc: Curtis offers to help fix Vanessa's new car, but Bernie thinks he has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show
programme.desc: While baby-sitting Bryana, Jordan watches a horror movie and scares himself into believing that zombies are trying to kill him and Bryana.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show
programme.desc: Wanda learns about Bernie's secret discipline-keeping device; its power corrupts her.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City
programme.desc: Join Splash and Too Tall in the wonders of Bali where they plunge into the elemental mystical world of Balinese spirituality, uncover how a cute critter crafts one of the priciest coffees on Earth, buddy up with elephants.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City
programme.desc: Embark on a wild escapade with the Harlem Globetrotters, Thunder and Jet as they unravel the rich tapestry of the diaspora and indigenous black natives of Limon, Costa Rica. They swing through the lush jungles, stumble upon one-of-a-kind beaches.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block
programme.desc: It's more than just where we're from.

programme.title: Style Kings
programme.desc: Dedrick and Dr. Lesia Crumpton Young embark on the Greatness Collection to shatter glass ceilings and shine a light on female greatness; Justin recalls the sourcing visits he went on to select lighting and wallpaper for business woman Corrina's home.

programme.title: Style Kings
programme.desc: Justin navigates the most expensive bathroom redesign he's encountered with clients Darius and Christopher; advanced technology requires a lot of pre-planning to get everything functioning just right; Dedrick brings style to a new industry.

programme.title: Style Kings
programme.desc: Justin tackles a complex bathroom redesign for clients with many requests; Dedrick strategizes with his team on expanding Hideoki's reach through product launches and roadshows.

programme.title: Style Kings
programme.desc: Dedrick has a visit from his previous Artistic Director, Crystal Paris, a renowned artist who has a surprise gift for him; Justin finesses the finishing touches on Lamar's condo in the city with art from his personal collection.

programme.title: The Dempsey Sisters
programme.desc: Three siblings (Cymphonique Miller, Denyce Lawton, Teairra Mari) return to their musical roots, agreeing to let their brother manage their family band.

programme.title: Love Will Find a Way
programme.desc: Reggie's search for love continues in Paris with Troy and Piper.

programme.title: Family Time
programme.desc: Even with Ebony's return, tempers continue to flare between Tony and Lisa.

programme.title: Family Time
programme.desc: Devin makes a new friend and shows the real meaning of the season.

programme.title: Family Time
programme.desc: When Tony shares common interests with Ebony, Devin turns to Uncle Donnie for quality time; Lisa is swindled into purchasing a time-share.

programme.title: Family Time
programme.desc: Tony believes Rachel and Lori are trying to make a pass at him; Lisa thinks her new Spanish tutor is trying to teach her more than the language of love.

programme.title: Family Time
programme.desc: Lisa gets more than she bargained for when planning a trip for her and her sisters; Tony gets some bad work advice.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show
programme.desc: Jordan learns some magic tricks and uses them to charm his first crush.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show
programme.desc: Bernie calls on India.Arie to help out with Vanessa's talent show.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: A Chihuahua poses a threat to a pet mom's romantic life.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar finds a dog to help a woman heal; he helps a territorial Maltipom.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar rehabs two aggressive German Shepherds, and one very loud Min Pin Mix.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar helps a rottweiler on house arrest and a Pom Terrier to socialize.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: A cattle dog protects her fearful owner, and a family finds a perfect pal.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar finds a match for a young couple and helps with separation anxiety.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: A cattle dog protects her fearful owner, and a family finds a perfect pal.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar's rehab of two violent dogs threatening to kill each other continues.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar finds a perfect dog for a single mom and helps a biting mini pinscher.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar rehabs an overprotective Great Dane mix.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: A Chihuahua poses a threat to a pet mom's romantic life.

programme.title: Cesar Millan: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar finds a dog to help a woman heal; he helps a territorial Maltipom.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The active Van Beek family check out three rescue dogs, Juliette, a Shih-tsuh mix, Jet, a pug Jack Russell mix, and Emily, an Australian terrier mix.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Ludlow family is looking for a puppy to teach their daughters responsibility.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The beach-loving Bulwa family consider one of three rescue dogs: Lily, a Schnauzer-terrier mix, Brewster, a terrier mix, and Bubba, a French bulldog.

programme.title: Zoo Diaries
programme.desc: A young gorilla meets his match; a tortoise learns to come when she's called.

programme.title: Zoo Diaries
programme.desc: A male Komodo dragon meets his mates; a bird's rehabilitation.

programme.title: Zoo Diaries
programme.desc: A pair of Polar Bears are sent off; getting a mandrill to sit still.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The active Van Beek family check out three rescue dogs, Juliette, a Shih-tsuh mix, Jet, a pug Jack Russell mix, and Emily, an Australian terrier mix.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Ludlow family is looking for a puppy to teach their daughters responsibility.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The beach-loving Bulwa family consider one of three rescue dogs: Lily, a Schnauzer-terrier mix, Brewster, a terrier mix, and Bubba, a French bulldog.

programme.title: Zoo Diaries
programme.desc: A young gorilla meets his match; a tortoise learns to come when she's called.

programme.title: Zoo Diaries
programme.desc: A male Komodo dragon meets his mates; a bird's rehabilitation.

programme.title: Zoo Diaries
programme.desc: A pair of Polar Bears are sent off; getting a mandrill to sit still.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The beach-loving Bulwa family consider one of three rescue dogs: Lily, a Schnauzer-terrier mix, Brewster, a terrier mix, and Bubba, a French bulldog.

programme.title: Zoo Diaries
programme.desc: A young gorilla meets his match; a tortoise learns to come when she's called.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: From snaking rivers to windswept mountains, explore the iconic, wild wonder of the West.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets
programme.desc: The docs at Critter Fixer move quickly to save a canine bitten by a snake.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: A family tradition for the generations, it's time for an incredible fair.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on how leopards hunt their prey, such as the impala, catfish and storks, offering new insights into their killer strategies.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Final part of the acclaimed nature series. A look at primates - from armies of hamadryas baboons battling in Ethiopia to macaques in Japan lounging in thermal springs.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents this definitive nature series. A look at mammals' many survival strategies, featuring some unique footage of a killer whale.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: The wildlife series looks at marine invertebrates and some of the planet's most bizarre and beautiful animals.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: The stunning nature series here looks at plants and the ingenious solutions that they employ to counter life's challenges, such as spring-loaded traps, suckers and claws.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Final part of the acclaimed nature series. A look at primates - from armies of hamadryas baboons battling in Ethiopia to macaques in Japan lounging in thermal springs.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents this definitive nature series. A look at mammals' many survival strategies, featuring some unique footage of a killer whale.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: The wildlife series looks at marine invertebrates and some of the planet's most bizarre and beautiful animals.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: The stunning nature series here looks at plants and the ingenious solutions that they employ to counter life's challenges, such as spring-loaded traps, suckers and claws.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Final part of the acclaimed nature series. A look at primates - from armies of hamadryas baboons battling in Ethiopia to macaques in Japan lounging in thermal springs.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents this definitive nature series. A look at mammals' many survival strategies, featuring some unique footage of a killer whale.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of Robin Hood's Bay, a fishing village on the North Yorkshire coast, and reveals tales of smuggling intrigue and bravery.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Kevin and Kieran move three state-of-the-art trains, fresh in from Japan. They need to transport them from the North East port of Redcar to a factory in Doncaster.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The crew head to Germany to collect a maintenance machine so large it needs to be loaded onto two trucks. Eric and Chris oversee a diesel-engine exchange.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A fully restored Class 47 diesel engine is transported from its home at Crewe Heritage Centre in Cheshire to the Ecclesbourne Valley Railway in Derbyshire.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A CBD80 battery-powered loco needs to be hauled 20 miles from a factory in Burton-on-Trent to the heritage Chasewater Railway in Staffordshire.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Kevin and Kieran move three state-of-the-art trains, fresh in from Japan. They need to transport them from the North East port of Redcar to a factory in Doncaster.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The crew head to Germany to collect a maintenance machine so large it needs to be loaded onto two trucks. Eric and Chris oversee a diesel-engine exchange.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A fully restored Class 47 diesel engine is transported from its home at Crewe Heritage Centre in Cheshire to the Ecclesbourne Valley Railway in Derbyshire.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A CBD80 battery-powered loco needs to be hauled 20 miles from a factory in Burton-on-Trent to the heritage Chasewater Railway in Staffordshire.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The much-missed comedy duo delight in this 1976 episode of their hugely popular sketch show, back when they ruled the TV roost on Saturday evenings.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The revered comedy duo of Corbett and Barker, from 1976. The classic sketches include a send up of cricket commentators and another blast from the Phantom Raspberry Blower.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More from the legendary comic duo. This show from 1976 features some now-classic skits including It's a Washout, the Mispronunciation Sketch, Il Trovatore and One Downmanship.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Treasurable comedy from the much-loved, much-missed Ronnies at their comedic peak. Sketches include Tomorrow's Kitchen and the latest from the Phantom Raspberry Blower saga.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Featuring the Opticians and You Can Say That Again sketches. Enjoy the eponymous Ronnies in their 1970s heyday, with plenty of memorable comedy routines to savour.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The much-missed comedy duo delight in this 1976 episode of their hugely popular sketch show, back when they ruled the TV roost on Saturday evenings.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The revered comedy duo of Corbett and Barker, from 1976. The classic sketches include a send up of cricket commentators and another blast from the Phantom Raspberry Blower.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: An eminent astronomer dies in mysterious circumstances, while Darlene anticipates a change of job.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates a survivalist commune when a members is poisoned inside a locked bunker. Meanwhile, Neville has a series of adventurous dates with Sophie.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a former children's home resident. At the bar, Selwyn meets daughter Andrina for the first time.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of an estate agent during the sale of a beach. Meanwhile, love is in the air for Neville following an unexpected encounter.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team joins Naomi in Saint Barnabas when her best friend's father is murdered at a wedding. Marlon tries to prepare for his exams but is easily distracted.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A series of murders occurs after Murdoch and Ogden's book is released, prompting a desperate search for the copycat killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part One: A constable is shot in a botched raid on an opium den led by Watts, and Murdoch suspects John is being framed for murder by Inspector McWorthy.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part Two: In the season finale, Murdoch suspects John is being framed for murder by Inspector McWorthy, and Brackenreid goes after the corrupt copper.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: In a special musical episode, Murdoch takes a bullet to the back of the head and slips into a coma where everyone in his world bursts into song.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a lively evening on the Starbright Lounge dance floor erupts into a fight, a man is found dead. On arrival, Murdoch learns that a man struck the victim and fled.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of an estate agent during the sale of a beach. Meanwhile, love is in the air for Neville following an unexpected encounter.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team joins Naomi in Saint Barnabas when her best friend's father is murdered at a wedding. Marlon tries to prepare for his exams but is easily distracted.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a former children's home resident. At the bar, Selwyn meets daughter Andrina for the first time.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part 1: The team investigates the murder of a water taxi driver at the same time as Neville receives an anonymous letter warning them a murder is due to take place.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part 2: The team must prove Neville's innocence when he's arrested on suspicion of murder, especially when the inspector brought in is certain of his guilt.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a calypso singer's husband. Neville struggles with Sophie's revelations and contemplates his future in Saint Marie.

programme.title: Death in Paradise: Christmas 2021
programme.desc: After a wealthy shipping magnate is found dead at a Christmas party, a man in London receives a mysterious Christmas card connected to the victim's death.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a former children's home resident. At the bar, Selwyn meets daughter Andrina for the first time.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part 1: The team investigates the murder of a water taxi driver at the same time as Neville receives an anonymous letter warning them a murder is due to take place.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part 2: The team must prove Neville's innocence when he's arrested on suspicion of murder, especially when the inspector brought in is certain of his guilt.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Alf gives advice to an old friend. Brax makes a tough decision. Tane is losing patience.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides Australia
programme.desc: Our crack-up Travel Guides head to Tropical North Queensland! They'll try white water rafting and aqua aerobics before exploring the Great Barrier Reef. How will they rate this Aussie destination?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After saving Springfield from a fire, Bart is rewarded with a driver's license. Guest starring Natalie Portman. S18 E12

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Let the battle begin! Leonard, Sheldon and Raj fight for tenure at the University - and the competition heats up when the girls get involved! S6 E20

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie blows up at David. Levi fights to save a life. Harper gets an unexpected message.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage's headspace crashes.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: A high-stakes face-off sees Tākapu and Kāhu go head-to-head. Then, an emotional elimination battle leaves one team heartbroken.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The FBI and LAPD join forces on a covert sting operation to protect Bailey; Wesley and Angela face tensions in their marriage when his campaign is threatened by a public scandal. S8 E12

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Bex races to catch Zack Lang, a class-obsessed serial killer who bludgeoned wealthy New Yorkers; Bex notices a sharp contrast between his victims in the past and present. S2 E3

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: A high-stakes face-off sees Tākapu and Kāhu go head-to-head. Then, an emotional elimination battle leaves one team heartbroken.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy take a group of high school CSI Explorer Scouts on a field trip, they embellish their role in solving cases and take their assignment a little bit too far. S10 E18

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Mr Throwback
programme.desc: Stephen is in a shooting slump, so Kimberly asks Danny for help finding the one person who can help. S1 E3

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: Our remaining farmers visit the homes of their final two partners, as they prepare for their biggest decision yet…who to share the rest of their lives with. S12 E12

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou can’t sleep. Pania says she’ll sing them a song, as long as they stay awake for the whole thing.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage's headspace crashes.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Ranvir Singh hosts three teams who will go head-to-head over a series of Riddiculous riddles set by Riddlemaster Henry Lewis!

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Cody and Britta test their mettle when Gwen has a child go missing, and Brad has a child that is all too present. S3 E8

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal UK
programme.desc: Join host Stephen Mulhern for one of the most exciting and iconic gameshows of all time as one of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a life-changing cash prize.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Greek Job
programme.desc: Inspired by Gerald Durrell’s love of wildlife, Amanda and Alan design their first ever children’s bedroom and visit Gerald’s widow Lee for inspiration.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: While Harry and William babysit the kids, Neha helps Debbie hunt down the blackmailer. But the blackmailer has so much dirt on the Fendons – can Neha fight fire with fire? S1 E4

programme.title: Snow Patrol NZ
programme.desc: Season Finale: Tom’s birthday disaster. Can Dr Nikki get his shoulder back in place in time for his party? Parker’s nasty slide on the magic carpet. And Coronet Peak’s staff end the season in st

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: Sarah’s ‘wooden condoms’ gaffe has gone viral at the same time as rumours about a high-profile footballer demand an immediate response. Can the team rise to both challenges? S1 E4

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob, David and Lee are joined by Heston Blumenthal, Miles Jupp, Ed Byrne and Emilia Fox.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage's headspace crashes.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Aaron resets a netballer's shoulder, but is he prepared for her cheeky banter? Chris teams up with Laura to help a Parkinson's patient with an infection that could turn septic.

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa with WWF
programme.desc: Pax and Nicola make their way to the Mackenzie Basin, home to many Aotearoa native species. S1 E1

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Ranvir Singh hosts three teams who will go head-to-head over a series of Riddiculous riddles set by Riddlemaster Henry Lewis!

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Brilliant surreal comedy with the masterful Richard Wilson. Mystery ensues when Victor digs out his ventriloquist's dummy - and finds it promptly banished by Margaret.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The classic surreal comedy with the great Richard Wilson. Victor and Margaret head off for a weekend by the seaside at their friends Vince and April's boarding house.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A classic episode in which the whole programme takes place in the Meldrews' bedroom. Victor has a sleepless night and, naturally, Margaret suffers with him.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The classic sitcom about two ill-matched friends. 'Those whom God hath joined together let no man put asunder' - does that include Terry Collier.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 1970s comedy at its finest. Bob and Thelma begin their married life with a Norwegian honeymoon - far away from Terry's destructive influence.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Clement and La Frenais' sitcom sequel. Terry is off his beer and making midnight visits to Bob's house to discuss the meaning and mystery of life. Could this be love.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business. Featured vehicles include a Mini Cooper and Chevrolet Pick-up.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from the chateaux of the Loire Valley to the heart of the Champagne region at Reims.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo goes on a rail journey through Germany, beginning in the vibrant city of Berlin, where he visits the Museum of Modern Art in Kreuzberg.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: VW T25 / Audi TT Quattro: The team pay over the odds for a VW Campervan, but can they hope to break even when they turn out a lovely bus for auction.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A 1969 Morris Mini Cooper MkII is totally restored by specialists. They give it the full works, which means only one thing... any chance of profit heads towards an open window.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The critically acclaimed documentary series all about World War II. Hear about the Allied scientists' controversial efforts to develop a new, immensely powerful weapon.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: We Shall Fight Them In The Streets: The physical defence of London was crucial. A ring of steel and concrete was thrown up around the capital as well as utilising natural defences.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Chester Cathedral, where they cast their eyes over jewels smuggled out of pre-revolution Russia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Ascot Racecourse, where items brought in for valuation include a small coin dug up by a young visitor and a model of a champion racehorse.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Three rare Alvises get the auction buyers going. A Chevy Corvette which started its journey in Saudi Arabia makes its way to Thornton le Dale.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave gets a nasty surprise when he opens the bonnet of a fast Ford, and an Austin Heavy 12 nearly a century old sets off a bidding war at the auction.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The critically acclaimed documentary series all about World War II. Hear about the Allied scientists' controversial efforts to develop a new, immensely powerful weapon.

programme.title: Blue Planet
programme.desc: Oceanic explorations, topped off with David Attenborough's masterful narration. Learn about the predatory skills of some of the planet's most charismatic hunters.

programme.title: Blue Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough salutes the survival techniques of creatures who endure harsh conditions in the Arctic and Antarctic, as the lauded natural history series continues.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: We Shall Fight Them In The Streets: The physical defence of London was crucial. A ring of steel and concrete was thrown up around the capital as well as utilising natural defences.

programme.title: Great Australian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Canberra to Melbourne, hearing the history of the cricket Ashes, and visiting the home of soprano Dame Nellie Melba.

programme.title: Locomotion: Dan Snow's History of Railways
programme.desc: Dan Snow recalls the golden age of railways, from the late 1800s to World War II. It was the biggest industry in the world's strongest state, but who did our tracks belong to.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough journeys into the hidden world of forests, from the temperate rainforests of Canada, to the teak forests of India.

programme.title: A Perfect Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a documentary revealing how the forces of nature drive, shape and support the Earth's great diversity of life, beginning with volcanoes.
